    I

    InitialAccessPage - Class in pages
    InitialAccessPage builds and shows the initial access UI used for login, sign-up and password reset flows.
    InitialAccessPage(DatabaseHelper) - Constructor for class pages.InitialAccessPage
    Create an InitialAccessPage backed by the provided DatabaseHelper.
